creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Martin,

the dependency handling is still wrong in www/aolserver, you can find a 
log here:
http://people.freebsd.org/~gabor/logs/aolserver-4.5.0.log

And if you submit a new fix, please don't forget what I asked in my 
previous mail and send just a unified diff against the current version 
of www/aolserver. Dealing with shell archives for existing ports makes 
our work terribly complicated.

Thanks in advance,
Gabor Kovesdan
